info.title: Return And Refund - bg.aftersales.parentaftersales.list.get
info.description: This interface is designed to provide real-time updates on the current after-sales status of an order within an e-commerce platform. It allows merchants and buyers to retrieve detailed information about the progress of a refund or return request, facilitating efficient communication and processing.

post.summary: This interface is designed to provide real-time updates on the current after-sales status of an order within an e-commerce platform. It allows merchants and buyers to retrieve detailed information about the progress of a refund or return request, facilitating efficient communication and processing.
post.description: This interface is designed to provide real-time updates on the current after-sales status of an order within an e-commerce platform. It allows merchants and buyers to retrieve detailed information about the progress of a refund or return request, facilitating efficient communication and processing.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.aftersales.parentaftersales.list.get`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: pageSize
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Page size for pagination, default is 10, max is 200.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: pageNo
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Page number for pagination, default is 1.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: parentOrderSnList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The list of parent order numbers to limit the query.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: parentAfterSalesSnList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The list of parent after-sales order numbers to limit the query.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: createAtStart
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The start time for querying the status change time of parent after-sales orders, in seconds (timestamp). Defines the starting range of the status change time when querying parent after-sales orders.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: createAtEnd
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The end time for querying the creation time of parent after-sales orders, in seconds (timestamp). Defines the ending range (closed interval) of the creation time when querying parent after-sales orders. -Must be used in conjunction with createAtStart. -- At least one set of creation or update times must be provided as required input parameters.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: updateAtStart
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The start time for querying the status change time of parent after-sales orders, in seconds (timestamp). Defines the starting range of the status change time when querying parent after-sales orders.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: updateAtEnd
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The end time for querying the status change time of parent after-sales orders, in seconds (timestamp). Defines the ending range (closed interval) of the status change time when querying parent after-sales orders. - Must be used in conjunction with updateAtStart. - At least one set of creation or update times must be provided as required input parameters.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: afterSalesStatusGroup
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The after-sales order status group, enumerated as follows: 1: Pending, 2: Requested, 3: Package Shipped, 4: Platform Reviewing, 5: Refunded, 6: Rejected, 7: Cancelled.

x-temu-response-parameters.name: success
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Whether it was successful or not
